title: dubouzetia elegans var. novoguineensis
intro: Dubouzetia elegans var. novoguineensis is a plant species, also known as a tree, belonging to the family Escalloniaceae. It is native to Papua New Guinea and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits, which include antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Herbal preparations of Dubouzetia elegans var. novoguineensis include extracts and infusions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and other remedies.
